methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing gypsum stalactite samples for U/Th dating and stable isotope analysis.

steps.description: SBL is a 63-cm long gypsum stalactite that was naturally detached from the ceiling of Sima Blanca Cave when collected at a depth of ~10 m in 2007.
steps.searchable_summary: collect gypsum stalactite sample from cave

steps.description: The speleothem was cut along its longitudinal axis and we sampled concentric layers at constant distance of ~5 mm from the inner orifice.
steps.searchable_summary: cut and sample concentric layers from stalactite

steps.description: Five subsamples (3–10 g each) for U/Th dating were extracted along the main growth axis of the stalactite using a Dremel drill with 1 mm diameter bit.
28 subsamples of 150 mg every 2.3 cm were taken for stable isotope analysis of GHW and each sample spot is 0.5 cm wide.
steps.searchable_summary: extract subsamples for stable isotope analysis

methods.description: Procedure for conducting U/Th dating analyses on gypsum subsamples to determine the age of the stalactite.

steps.description: Powdered gypsum subsample (3–10 g) were weighed and transferred to 250 mL Teflon beakers, in which weighed amounts of a mixed spike 233U–236U–229Th had been placed and evaporated.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare gypsum subsample with mixed spike for U/Th dating

steps.description: The sample and spike were covered with water and transferred to a magnetic stirring hot plate and hot diluted HCl (~0.5 M) was added slowly until all the gypsum sample was completely dissolved.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve gypsum sample in diluted HCl

steps.description: After the dissolution of the gypsum, ~7 mg of iron carrier (FeCl3) was added and the solution was left on the stirring plate overnight for spike sample equilibration.
steps.searchable_summary: add iron carrier and equilibrate solution overnight

steps.description: The uranium and thorium were separated from the bulk of the material with Fe(OH)3 precipitation using NH4OH.
steps.searchable_summary: separate uranium and thorium using Fe(OH)3 precipitation

steps.description: The precipitates were washed with MilliQ water and then dissolved in 6 N HCl.
steps.searchable_summary: wash precipitates and dissolve in 6 N HCl

steps.description: The U-Th separation was conducted using AG1X8 anionic resin bed.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct U-Th separation using anionic resin bed

steps.description: The U and Th fractions were deposited on Re filament between two layers of graphite and measured using a Triton Plus mass spectrometer (TIMS) equipped with an RPQ.
steps.searchable_summary: measure U and Th fractions using mass spectrometer

steps.description: U–Th ages were calculated from the isotopic ratios using ISOPLOT/Ex version 2.0 software.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate U-Th ages using ISOPLOT/Ex software
